title: voglera hispanica
intro: Voglera hispanica, also known as Spanish valerian or wild valerian, is a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. Its medicinal properties include its ability to act as a sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic, making it a popular remedy for insomnia, restlessness, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of Voglera hispanica include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Voglera hispanica can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a natural and holistic way.
